label: Conversational assistants & chatbots

node.label: Conversational assistants & chatbots
node.definition: Conversational assistants combine language models, dialogue state, memory, retrieval, tools, policy controls, and user-facing interaction loops.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Conversational assistants & chatbots is to connect Large language models, Context windows & working memory to downstream capabilities including Tutoring, translation & knowledge work.
examples: substrate for Tutoring, translation & knowledge work
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Large language models, Context windows & working memory.

dependencies.rationale: Conversational assistants & chatbots integrates Large language models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
